title: Patterns of Evidence: Moses Controversy
original_title: Patterns of Evidence: The Moses Controversy
overview: This documentary reveals amazing evidence connected to Moses’s ability to write the first books of the Bible and why most mainstream scholars are blinded to that possibility today.
